# debugDescription

**Instance Property**

A text representation of the logistic regression classifier that’s suitable for output during debugging.

## Declaration

```swift
var debugDescription: String { get }
```

## Describing a logistic regression classifier

- **description**: A text representation of the logistic regression classifier.
- **playgroundDescription**: A description of the logistic regression classifier shown in a playground.
